top_findings.summary: The skill instructs the use of highly unsafe flags for all agentic coding tools: `--dangerously-skip-permissions` (Claude Code), `--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox` (Codex CLI), and `--yolo` (Gemini CLI). These flags explicitly disable safety checks and permission systems, granting the forked terminal sessions elevated privileges that could bypass security controls. While the skill's stated purpose is to fork terminal sessions, it systematically disables security safeguards in a way that creates excessive privilege escalation risks unrelated to the core functionality of creating new terminal windows.
